title: Horror Cryptid: Sasquatch (Bigfoot)
description: Adds Bigfoot to the game in a scary way
body:
![The scary forest where Sasquatch is found](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acb6d4240d2569c10e5cb15a4464691a494dba27.png)
 

Version 1.2.2 out now! Small update that adds more sounds and makes Bigfoot deadlier. If you see red eyes, you might wanna get far from your base...

Version 1.2 out now! A lot of things were added: hunting towers, ruined railways, Bigfoot activity, sounds, and much more!

 

------------------------

 

You shouldn't have gotten lost in this forest...

 

---------------------

 

NOTE: It is strongly advised that you use shaders like Insanity or Spooklementary, that make the nights really dark.

This really improves the experience since very important mechanics of the mod are built around the limited visibility at night.

 

---------------------

 

This mod adds the well known cryptid Bigfoot, also known as Sasquatch, in a way that prioritizes horror, build-up, and paranoia.

It only appears in the Old Growth Pine Taiga biome, a single biome world is recommended.

 

The entity gets angrier overtime, or when you bother it. The more angry it is, the worse things get...

 
![I wonder who killed this hunter...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a63074e3b4891eb9088228e325c4c35b35902d39.png)
 

 

You might even find the remains of dead hunters around the woods. Wonder who killed them...

 

![A camp in the woods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69ee737450ae038e9d434d0b9a8333b5b97e5677.png)

 

If you're lucky enough, maybe you will find an old camp with some helpful loot!

 

Upon entering the Old Growth Pine Taiga, you'll be given a mysterious device: the Sasquatch Detector! Use it to 

make sure there are no cryptids nearby, stalking you...

 

 ![A strange device that might be your savior...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d0dab299d9837675873b6bc948f4d8e90fec92a.png)

 

If you feel like there's something out there at night, don't be scared! Go out and search for the creature! Or maybe you shouldn't...

 

But I don't wanna give more spoilers, go try it out by yourself! If you use this mod in a video, please tell me! It'll make me really happy!

 

![What is that big figure?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93c34c69224b37d661018b45828ee00de25eeb5d.png)

 

Here's my dumb spanish channel: https://www.youtube.com/@tortudragon/featured
